ddls:
CREATE TABLE "option_prices" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option entry */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the option */,
  "option_price" REAL /* Current price of the option */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of option (call/put) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the option */,
  "underlying_asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the underlying asset */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_prices_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_prices_underlying_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("underlying_asset_id") REFERENCES underlying_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volatility_assumptions" (
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility entry */,
  "volatility_level" REAL /* Volatility level used in pricing models */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the volatility level was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volatility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing scenario */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the option being priced */,
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the volatility assumption used */,
  "avbs_price" REAL /* Calculated price based on the scenario */,
  "scenario_description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the scenario was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_scenarios_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES option_prices ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_scenarios_volatility_id FOREIGN KEY ("volatility_id") REFERENCES volatility_assumptions ("volatility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_scenarios_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES trading_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the trader or analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active/inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trade occurred */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy/sell) */,
  "trade_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (completed/cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES option_prices ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES trading_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_analysis" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk analysis entry */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option being analyzed */,
  "delta" REAL /* Delta value of the option */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma value of the option */,
  "vega" REAL /* Vega value of the option */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta value of the option */,
  "rho" REAL /* Rho value of the option */,
  "analyzed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the risk analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_analysis_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES option_prices ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the underlying asset */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the asset */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "market_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the market */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  "underlying_asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the underlying asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_underlying_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("underlying_asset_id") REFERENCES underlying_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scenario used for the report */,
  "generated_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (summary/detailed) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (PDF/HTML) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_reports_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES pricing_scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES trading_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, action on report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES trading_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "underlying_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each underlying asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "asset_description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the asset */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, CSV file) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "strategy_description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the strategy was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES trading_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Specific permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API integration */,
  "api_name" TEXT /* Name of the API */,
  "api_url" TEXT /* URL of the API */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for authentication */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last sync */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
